label: plain_text
text:
Here, the amount of money
(in ?) put in the money
box on her first, second, third,
fourth ... birthday 
were respectively 1
100, 150, 200, 250, . . . till her 21st birthday. To
find the total amount in the money l
box on her 21st birthday, we will have to write each
of the 21 numbers in the list above and then add them up. Don't you think it would be
a tedious and time consuming process? Can we make the process shorter? This would
be possible if we can f
find a method for getting
this sum. Let us see.
